race.comment: CASTLEFIELD FLYER (4) is worth following up. Resumed over 1200m and found the line nicely for a close-up third. Was a second-up winner at only other attempt and looks suited by the longer journey. Goes close. ALTERNATE (2) was a determined winner in easier company fresh but did add to a strong 1400m record. Goes even better second-up so fitter can measure up again. WESTERN LANE (3) raced on speed and scored an overdue maiden win last time at Echuca, This is a far tougher gate but on the up and can measure up again. BOULDER JACK (6) is ready to hit best form and will take plenty of beating. NO OVERTAKING (5) has been thereabouts. First try this trip but in the mix on best form.
